raw_transcript: This is what we call 'steroid-dependent' or 'steroid-refractory' colitis. Given the frequency and the systemic symptoms, I'm actually going to recommend we admit you to the hospital today for IV steroids.
final_corrected_note: This is what we call 'steroid-dependent' or 'steroid-refractory' colitis. Given the frequency and the systemic symptoms, I'm actually going to recommend we admit you to the hospital today for IV steroids.
